text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #42)
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #42)

good work to replicate the issue !

while off-topic :
the BOOTP/DHCP-messages are from u-boot.
it switches to try to netboot after failing disk-detection.
when it says : ``serverip' not set" 
that means that you can e.g. :
`setenv serverip 10.0.0.23`
tftp file.xy
boot
(presumed you have a  pxe-setup @youserverip)
